channel.title: Note-Taking on Ben Selby
channel.description: Recent content in Note-Taking on Ben Selby

item.title: Multi-cursor support in Obsidian
item.description: This post brings together two of my favourite things: Note taking, and multiple cursors. I remember the first time an engineer introduced me to Sublime Text. The main thing he would bang on about was multiple cursors. I was very quickly sold. It’s pure magic and speeds up so many things. I instantly switched from Eclipse PDT to Sublime Text. I’ve always liked writing notes, but always struggled with various tools.
